rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAYMOND T FONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARGARET CAITLIN WESTERFIELD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, notwithstanding the incorrect statutory fee calculation and absence of itemized attorney costs and the missing representative capacity of the petitioner (administrator) on the face of the Notice of Hearing, as well as some other minor misstatements. NB: In order for this Court to track closed matters, orders to terminate a proceeding must begin with the following language: "Order for Final Distribution." [LRSF 14.35 I.6.b.] Please make a note of it.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DOUGLAS J OERTEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate will be set for 8/25/25. The personal representative must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before that status date. Appearance will be required on 8/25/25 if no petition has been filed. (Item 4 of the proof of service requires the city AND STATE.)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EMILY C. TIMLOW TRUST FBO RICHARD CRAIG HILL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Confirm Co-Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/16/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service of notice has been filed. (Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.]) (3) There are no exhibits attached to the petition. An amended (complete) petition must be filed. An amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. (4) All petitions involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries. [CRC 7.902.] Unless an exception applies, such beneficiaries must either receive or waive notice. (5) It appears that the ex parte petition to appoint a guardian ad litem was rejected. In the existing case (PTR-02-283862), K. Bruce Friedmann was appointed as the guardian ad litem for Richard Craig Hill on 11/15/02. (This petition should have been filed in the existing case.) Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the amended petition and any other papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 10/7/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL RICHARDSON FREY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/22/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) The Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities must be filed. (4) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. (5) Item 3h of the petition is incomplete. (6) Notwithstanding the waivers of bond, a proposed non-resident personal representative must file a declaration setting forth in detail the anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate for the Court to determine the amount of the bond. [LRSF 14.16 F.] (7) When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] Who were the decedent's parents and when did they die? (8) Item 8 must also indicate the age ("adult" for an adult is sufficient) of the persons listed. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues (a supplement, signed and verified by the petitioner) to the assigned examiner by 10/11/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
